extension.summary: Superpowered Trakt Player - Click and Play with Debrid, AI Vibes, Discovery Feed
extension.description:
Full Trakt and TMDB integration for Movies and TV Shows. Click-and-Play via Debrid services (Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize). AI-powered discovery, trailer feed, and marathon mode.
Features: - Click-and-Play: Auto 1080p via debrid with cache-first priority - AI Vibes: Mood-based movie marathons powered by AI - Discovery Feed: Trending/upcoming trailers with marathon mode - Trakt Superpowers: Recommendations, Calendar, Continue Watching, Friends, Stats - Debrid: Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize with file-based token storage - Scrobble: Automatic Trakt scrobbling during playback - Up Next: Auto-play next episode - Custom Lists: Create, browse, and manage Trakt lists
Created by zeus768.
CHANGELOG:
v2.2.0 - Feature Merge + Premiumize Fix - MERGED: All custom features into zeus768's v2.1.6 fixed build - FIXED: Premiumize device code auth (was hitting /api/token instead of /token) - ADDED: AI Vibes - mood-based discovery with 12 presets + custom - ADDED: Discovery Feed - trending trailers, new releases, upcoming, shuffle, marathon - ADDED: Continue Watching from Trakt playback progress - ADDED: Recommended For You (personalized Trakt recommendations) - ADDED: Anticipated movies/shows - ADDED: My Calendar (upcoming episodes) - ADDED: My Custom Lists (create, browse, manage) - ADDED: Popular Community Lists - ADDED: Friends activity feed - ADDED: User Stats dashboard - ADDED: Account Status (debrid expiry, premium status) - ADDED: Buy Me a Beer (Ko-fi QR code) - ADDED: Rate on Trakt, Add to Watchlist, Add to List
v2.1.6 - Speed Optimizations - FASTER: Trakt lists now load 3-5x faster with parallel TMDB image fetching - FASTER: Reduced items per page to 30 for quicker loading - FASTER: Added image caching to avoid re-fetching - FASTER: Reduced API timeouts for snappier response
v2.1.5 - Major Fixes - FIXED: Trakt and Debrid authorization now persists properly - FIXED: Uses file-based token storage (trakt_token.json, rd_token.json) - FIXED: Auto-play with proper quality fallback (1080p to 720p to 480p) - FIXED: Cached torrent detection and priority playback - ADDED: Unlimited scroll/pagination in all lists - ADDED: Addon icon and fanart in all subfolders
v1.0.8 - Initial Release - Trakt and Debrid authorization using native urllib
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content.
extension.news:
v2.3.0 (2026) - FIXED: Premiumize auth code not showing (was sending grant_type instead of response_type) - FIXED: Real-Debrid false "expired" errors (token refresh now falls back to testing current token) - ADDED: Real account info for all debrid services (username, email, expiry date, days left) - ADDED: Real-Debrid shows fidelity points - ADDED: Color-coded expiry warnings (green/yellow/red based on days left) - IMPROVED: Account Status page now fetches live data from RD/PM/AD APIs
v2.2.0 (2026) - FIXED: Premiumize device code auth (was hitting /api/token instead of /token) - MERGED: All custom features into zeus768's v2.1.6 fixed build - ADDED: AI Vibes, Discovery Feed, Continue Watching, Recommendations - ADDED: Calendar, Custom Lists, Popular Lists, Friends, Stats - ADDED: Account Status, Buy Me a Beer, Rate, Watchlist, Add to List
v2.1.6 (2026) - FASTER: Trakt lists 3-5x faster with parallel TMDB image fetching - FASTER: Image caching, reduced API timeouts
v2.1.5 (2026) - FIXED: Trakt/Debrid auth persistence (file-based token storage) - ADDED: Unlimited pagination, quality fallback playback
